guestNote: Quick try, no email. Your data stays on this device — sign in later to keep it across devices.
guestConfirmBody: Your data stays on this device only — it won't sync to your phone or any other device. You can sign out later and sign back in with Google or email to keep your data, but anything you log as a guest stays here.
guestHint: No email — sign out and sign back in with Google or email to save your data.
toggleToSignUp: Don't have an account? Create one
notSignedInTitle: Sign in to enable live counts
notSignedInBody: Once signed in, your habit ticks count toward the live community totals shown next to each habit.

errors.userNotFound: No account found for that email.
errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email.
errors.disabled: Authentication isn't configured. Set up Firebase first.
